ambiguous.definition: open to more than one interpretation; not clear

collaborate.definition: to work jointly on an activity or project

comprehensive.definition: including all or nearly all elements or aspects of something

curtail.definition: to reduce in extent or quantity; to impose a restriction on

diligent.definition: having or showing care and conscientiousness in one's work

emulate.definition: to match or surpass a person or achievement, typically by imitation

feasible.definition: possible to do easily or conveniently

hinder.definition: to create difficulties for someone or something, resulting in delay

mitigate.definition: to make something bad less severe, serious, or painful

pragmatic.definition: dealing with things sensibly and realistically

resilient.definition: able to withstand or recover quickly from difficult conditions

subsequent.definition: coming after something in time; following

volatile.definition: liable to change rapidly and unpredictably, especially for the worse
